parameters.query: INSERT INTO "Document" (organization_id, filename, mime_type, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, 'indexing', NOW(), NOW()) RETURNING id, organization_id, filename, mime_type

={{ (() => { const cr = $('Yandex: Embed & Build Points').first().json.chunkRecords; let q = ''; for (const c of cr) { q += `INSERT INTO "DocumentChunk" (document_id, content, chunk_index, qdrant_id) VALUES (${c.document_id}, '${c.content.replace(/'/g, "''")}', ${c.chunk_index}, '${c.qdrant_id}');\n`; } q += `UPDATE "Document" SET status = 'ready', chunk_count = ${$('Yandex: Embed & Build Points').first().json.chunk_count}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = ${$('Yandex: Embed & Build Points').first().json.document_id};`; return q; })() }}

parameters.jsCode:
const prevData = $('Yandex: Embed & Build Points').first().json;
return [{ json: { success: true, document_id: prevData.document_id, chunk_count: prevData.chunk_count } }];
